audit_log_attributable.name: audit_log_attributable
audit_log_attributable.value: "audit_log"."actor_type" = 'SYSTEM' OR "audit_log"."actor_user_id" IS NOT NULL OR "audit_log"."actor_email" IS NOT NULL

solicitations_sourcing_gate.name: solicitations_sourcing_gate
solicitations_sourcing_gate.value:
"solicitations"."status" NOT IN ('READY_FOR_SOURCING','AWAITING_APPROVAL','SOURCING_IN_PROGRESS','PRICING_PENDING','PROPOSAL_DRAFT','SUBMITTED','AWARDED')
          OR ("solicitations"."sourcing_approved_by" IS NOT NULL AND "solicitations"."sourcing_approved_at" IS NOT NULL)

solicitations_is_services_provenance.name: solicitations_is_services_provenance
solicitations_is_services_provenance.value: "solicitations"."is_services" IS NULL OR "solicitations"."is_services_source" IS NOT NULL

outreach_approval_gate.name: outreach_approval_gate
outreach_approval_gate.value: "outreach_campaigns"."status" NOT IN ('APPROVED','SENT','RESPONDED','OPTED_OUT') OR ("outreach_campaigns"."approved_by" IS NOT NULL AND "outreach_campaigns"."approved_at" IS NOT NULL)

vendors_vetted_requires_vetter.name: vendors_vetted_requires_vetter
vendors_vetted_requires_vetter.value: "vendors"."status" <> 'VETTED' OR ("vendors"."vetted_by" IS NOT NULL AND "vendors"."vetted_at" IS NOT NULL)

proposals_submit_requires_human.name: proposals_submit_requires_human
proposals_submit_requires_human.value: "proposals"."status" NOT IN ('SUBMITTED','WON','LOST') OR ("proposals"."submitted_by" IS NOT NULL AND "proposals"."submitted_at" IS NOT NULL)

proposals_submit_requires_counsel.name: proposals_submit_requires_counsel
proposals_submit_requires_counsel.value: "proposals"."status" NOT IN ('SUBMITTED','WON','LOST') OR ("proposals"."counsel_reviewed_by" IS NOT NULL AND "proposals"."counsel_reviewed_at" IS NOT NULL)

line_items_sim_situated_consistency.name: line_items_sim_situated_consistency
line_items_sim_situated_consistency.value: NOT ("vendor_quote_line_items"."similarly_situated" IS TRUE AND "vendor_quote_line_items"."sub_small_business_status" IS DISTINCT FROM 'SMALL')

vendor_quotes_party_xor.name: vendor_quotes_party_xor
vendor_quotes_party_xor.value: ("vendor_quotes"."vendor_id" IS NOT NULL) <> ("vendor_quotes"."prospect_id" IS NOT NULL)

contracts_pop_order.name: contracts_pop_order
contracts_pop_order.value: "contracts"."pop_start" IS NULL OR "contracts"."pop_end" IS NULL OR "contracts"."pop_end" >= "contracts"."pop_start"

documents_owner_exactly_one.name: documents_owner_exactly_one
documents_owner_exactly_one.value:
(
        (CASE WHEN "documents"."solicitation_id" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
        (CASE WHEN "documents"."vendor_id" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
        (CASE WHEN "documents"."prospect_id" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
        (CASE WHEN "documents"."quote_id" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
        (CASE WHEN "documents"."proposal_id" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
        (CASE WHEN "documents"."contract_id" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
        (CASE WHEN "documents"."milestone_id" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
      ) = 1

documents_owner_matches_type.name: documents_owner_matches_type
documents_owner_matches_type.value:
("documents"."entity_type" = 'SOLICITATION' AND "documents"."solicitation_id" IS NOT NULL)
        OR ("documents"."entity_type" = 'VENDOR' AND "documents"."vendor_id" IS NOT NULL)
        OR ("documents"."entity_type" = 'VENDOR_PROSPECT' AND "documents"."prospect_id" IS NOT NULL)
        OR ("documents"."entity_type" = 'VENDOR_QUOTE' AND "documents"."quote_id" IS NOT NULL)
        OR ("documents"."entity_type" = 'PROPOSAL' AND "documents"."proposal_id" IS NOT NULL)
        OR ("documents"."entity_type" = 'CONTRACT' AND "documents"."contract_id" IS NOT NULL)
        OR ("documents"."entity_type" = 'CONTRACT_MILESTONE' AND "documents"."milestone_id" IS NOT NULL)
